name: Caramel Banana Ice Cream Dessert
recipeIngredient: 3 pints fat-free vanilla ice cream (6 cups)
1/4 cup fat-free caramel ice cream topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Line a cookie sheet with foil.
3. Place pecans in a single layer on the sheet and bake for 3-5 minutes, or until golden brown. Remove pecans and set aside to cool.
4. Scoop ice cream into a 13x9-inch baking dish. Spread gently over the bottom of the dish.
5. Top with banana slices.
6. Sprinkle crushed wafers evenly on top.
7. Warm caramel topping in the microwave for about 10 seconds, or until pourable but not hot. Repeat to warm chocolate syrup.
8. Drizzle caramel and chocolate syrup evenly over the crushed wafers.
9. Sprinkle pecans evenly on top.
10. Cover tightly with sprayed plastic wrap and freeze for at least 2 hours before serving.
11. Cut into squares to serve.
Yield: 12 servings
Per serving: 300 calories, 8 grams fat, 12% CFF, 0 mg cholesterol, 120 mg sodium
